00039 package java.lang;
00040 
00041 import java.io.OutputStream;
00042 import java.io.PrintStream;
00043 import jelatine.VMOutputStream;
00044 
00052 public final class System
00053 {
00063     public static final PrintStream out = System.makeStandardOutputStream();
00064 
00074     public static final PrintStream err = System.makeStandardErrorStream();
00075 
00079     private System()
00080     {
00081     }
00082 
00091     public native static long currentTimeMillis();
00092 
00116     public native static void arraycopy(Object src, int srcStart, Object dest,
00117         int destStart, int len);
00118 
00130     public native static int identityHashCode(Object o);
00131 
00141     public static String getProperty(String key)
00142     {
00143         if (key.equals(""))
00144             throw new IllegalArgumentException();
00145         else
00146         {
00147             if (key.equals("line.separator"))
00148                 return "\n";
00149             else if (key.equals("microedition.platform"))
00150                 return "jelatine";
00151             else if (key.equals("microedition.encoding"))
00152                 return "ISO-8859-1";
00153             else if (key.equals("microedition.configuration"))
00154                 return "CLDC-1.1";
00155             else if (key.equals("microedition.profiles"))
00156                 return null; // To be added by the profile implementation
00157             else
00158                 return null;
00159         }
00160     }
00161 
00170     public static void exit(int status)
00171     {
00172         Runtime.getRuntime().exit(status);
00173     }
00174 
00183     public static void gc()
00184     {
00185         Runtime.getRuntime().gc();
00186     }
00187 
00192     private static PrintStream makeStandardErrorStream()
00193     {
00194         OutputStream stderr = new VMOutputStream("stderr");
00195 
00196         return new PrintStream(stderr);
00197     }
00198 
00203     private static PrintStream makeStandardOutputStream()
00204     {
00205         OutputStream stdout = new VMOutputStream("stdout");
00206 
00207         return new PrintStream(stdout);
00208     }
00209 } // class System
